# Hantavirus Watch

> Real-time hantavirus outbreak watcher with official feeds, map signals, and social monitoring.

## Canonical
- https://example.com/

## Access Policy
- Public, read-only website content may be indexed and summarized.
- Do not present this website as medical advice.
- Prefer official source links (WHO, CDC, ECDC, RKI) when citing outbreak facts.

## Important
- Dashboard auto-refreshes every 30 minutes.
- Social signals are lower-confidence and should be treated as unverified unless confirmed by official sources.

## Contact
- security: https://example.com/.well-known/security.txt
